item.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Guthrie family cleared as possible suspects, sheriff says
item.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

item.title: WATCH: UPS driver terrorized by wild turkeys in Connecticut
item.description: This UPS driver was lucky to drive away unscathed after a wild run-in with a couple of turkeys on the streets of Branford, Connecticut.

item.title: WATCH: Rescue crew saves swan stuck on frozen pond
item.description: Rescue crews saved a swan that got stuck to the surface of a frozen pond in Rye, New York. Police said the swan was taken to a local animal rescue and...

item.title: WATCH: Woman surprises husband with pregnancy news during workout
item.description: Adorable viral video shows the moment an Arizona woman surprised her husband in the middle of their workout by revealing the couple was expecting thei...

item.title: Robert Duvall, star of 'The Godfather,' 'Apocalypse Now,' dead at 95
item.description: Robert Duvall, star of 'The Godfather,' 'Apocalypse Now,' has died at age 95.
